violations.text: The following food items found cooling at the time of inspection were observed in need of adjustment to cooling methods... - Lasagna soup was observed to be cooling in a covered plastic container at 55 degrees Fahrenheit in the single door reach-in - Chicken was observed cooling densely piled in a metal pan in the single door cooler at 96 degrees Fahrenheit Food items prepared in the food establishment and set for cooling are to be arranged in the EQUIPMENT to provide maximum heat transfer through the container walls, spread out in thin layers, and loosely covered, or uncovered if protected from overhead contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
